description: A hospital facility manager wants to assess how long their new microgrid (solar + battery + diesel generator) can power their critical loads during a grid outage.

nodes.task_description: Identify the hospital's critical loads and their total power demand in kW.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the critical load is 500 kW.

nodes.task_description: Get the current status of the microgrid assets: battery state of charge, solar generation forecast, and diesel fuel level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles the real-time status of all microgrid components.

nodes.task_description: Simulate the microgrid's operation during an outage, dispatching assets in order of cost (solar, battery, then diesel).

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a simulation of the microgrid under islanded mode.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total number of hours the microgrid can sustain the critical load.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reports that the microgrid can power critical loads for 72 hours.
